headline: OpenAI Unveils GPT-5.4-Cyber Specialized in Cyber Defense
summary: OpenAI released GPT-5.4-Cyber, a variant fine-tuned specifically for defensive cybersecurity tasks under the expanded Trusted Access program for authenticated defenders. The new model enables advanced defensive workflows while maintaining principles of democratic access and continuous protection. The official announcement came today, exactly one week after rival Anthropic’s Mythos launch.

headline: Major Update for Claude Code on Desktop
summary: Anthropic officially announced a complete redesign of Claude Code for desktop via its @claudeai account. Multiple Claude sessions can now run side-by-side in a single window, supported by a new sidebar for easy management. The update rolled out in the past few hours and marks a significant step toward a far more efficient coding experience.

headline: Anthropic Prepares Claude Opus 4.7 and New AI Design Tool
summary: According to an exclusive report published today by The Information, Anthropic is preparing the Opus 4.7 model along with a new AI design tool (vibe coding/design tool). The official announcement is expected within the next few days, only weeks after the limited Mythos Preview release.

headline: SAP Launches Intelligent AI Agents in Human Capital Management
summary: SAP announced today the direct integration of intelligent agents (agentic AI) into its human capital management solutions. The move enables complex automated tasks to run natively within enterprise systems.

headline: Amazon Releases AI Research Tool to Accelerate Early-Stage Drug Discovery
summary: Amazon announced a new AI-powered research tool designed to speed up the early discovery phase of new medicines. The tool is now available to researchers and pharmaceutical organizations.

headline: Google Adds AI Skills to Chrome and Rolls Out Gemini Personal Intelligence in India
summary: Google announced the addition of the AI Skills feature to Chrome, enabling users to save and reuse favorite workflows with AI assistance. The company also officially launched Gemini Personal Intelligence in India.

headline: Bank of England Raises Cybersecurity Concerns Over Anthropic’s New Mythos Model
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey expressed serious cybersecurity concerns today regarding Anthropic’s new Mythos model. He warned of potential risks to banks and financial institutions.

headline: Anthropic Appoints Novartis CEO to Its Board of Directors
summary: Anthropic has added the CEO of pharmaceutical giant Novartis to its board of directors. The appointment signals a stronger focus on medical and enterprise AI applications.

headline: Alibaba’s HappyHorse 1.0 Tops Global AI Video Generation Rankings
summary: Alibaba’s new HappyHorse 1.0 video-generation model has claimed the top spot in global rankings. The achievement was highlighted in today’s Wall Street Journal reports.
